subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Riḍá, inasmuch as thou didst hearken unto the Most Sweet Call when it was raised from the Divine Lote-Tree in the name of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا رضا بما سمعت الندآء الاحلی اذا ارتفع من السدره المنتهی باسم ربک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
